Title: Import > Catalog > Categories & Items > General
Preconditions:
Logged user with permission

Created csv file
Steps:
Step Description:

Open Catalog > open Categories & Items >

Expected Result:

Import icon displays

Step Description:

Click on Import

Expected Result:

New blade catalog.blades.importers-list.title is opened with link VirtoCommerce CSV import

Step Description:

Click on VirtoCommerce CSV import

Expected Result:

Blade Import catalog from csv is opened with next fields:

  • Csv column delimiter selector - empty value by default

    • Vertical
    • Tab
    • Semicolon
    • Comma
  • Upload Csv file - disabled before Csv column delimiter selector is empty
  • Map columns link - disabled before Upload Csv file is empty
Step Description:

Select value in Csv column delimiter selector

Expected Result:

Value is selected

Upload Csv file field is active

Step Description:

Select file in Upload Csv file field

Expected Result:

Map columns link is active

Step Description:

Click Map columns link

Expected Result:

Column mapping blade is opened

CSV column is filled using first string from uploaded csv file

Step Description:

Click OK in Column mapping blade >

Expected Result:

Column mapping blade is closed

Import catalog from csv is opened > button Start import is clicable

Step Description:

Click Start import

Expected Result:

Importing from csv blade is opened
Import is started - all info display in blade:

  • import started, time
  • import finished, time
  • new section creating
  • errors count
  • table with errors
Steps (Expected Result):
1.

Import icon displays

2.

New blade catalog.blades.importers-list.title is opened with link VirtoCommerce CSV import

3.

Blade Import catalog from csv is opened with next fields:

  • Csv column delimiter selector - empty value by default

    • Vertical
    • Tab
    • Semicolon
    • Comma
  • Upload Csv file - disabled before Csv column delimiter selector is empty
  • Map columns link - disabled before Upload Csv file is empty
4.

Value is selected

Upload Csv file field is active

5.

Map columns link is active

6.

Column mapping blade is opened

CSV column is filled using first string from uploaded csv file

7.

Column mapping blade is closed

Import catalog from csv is opened > button Start import is clicable

8.

Importing from csv blade is opened
Import is started - all info display in blade:

  • import started, time
  • import finished, time
  • new section creating
  • errors count
  • table with errors
Steps (Step):
1.

Open Catalog > open Categories & Items >

2.

Click on Import

3.

Click on VirtoCommerce CSV import

4.

Select value in Csv column delimiter selector

5.

Select file in Upload Csv file field

6.

Click Map columns link

7.

Click OK in Column mapping blade >

8.

Click Start import

Title: Import > Catalog > Import multiple product images via CSV
Preconditions:
The user has permissions to import data and has access to Export/Import Module
Created csv file with several URLs for images in AltImage column
Images uploaded to Assets > catalog > folder_1
Documentation - https://github.com/VirtoCommerce/vc-content/blob/deploy/pages/docs/lessons/lesson2.md
Example of file attached to test case
Steps:
Step Description:
1. In CSV file set multiple values in AltImage using ""--"" delimiter, for example - https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/0a98425e7.jpg--https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/3c7b6e154.jpg
2. Open Catalog > Categories & Items > choose nessesary category 
3. Click Import button
Expected Result:
1. Import started and finished successfully

Step Description:
1. Click Refresh button
Expected Result:
1. Product imported with images 
Step Description:
1. In CSV file set multiple values in AltImage using ""|"" delimiter, for example - https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/4abfa42d8.jpg|https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/0a98425e7.jpg
2. Open Catalog > Categories & Items > choose nessesary category 
3. Click Import button
Expected Result:
1. Import started and finished successfully

Step Description:
1. Click Refresh button
Expected Result:
1. Product imported with images
Steps (Expected Result):
1. 1. Import started and finished successfully

2. 1. Product imported with images 
3. 1. Import started and finished successfully

4. 1. Product imported with images

1. 1. In CSV file set multiple values in AltImage using ""--"" delimiter, for example - https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/0a98425e7.jpg--https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/3c7b6e154.jpg
2. Open Catalog > Categories & Items > choose nessesary category 
3. Click Import button
2. 1. Click Refresh button
3. 1. In CSV file set multiple values in AltImage using ""|"" delimiter, for example - https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/4abfa42d8.jpg|https://qademovc3.blob.core.windows.net/catalog/importtest/0a98425e7.jpg
2. Open Catalog > Categories & Items > choose nessesary category

Title: Export > Catalog > General
Preconditions: Create a product at the root of the Catalog.
Steps:
Step Description:
Open Catalog > open Categories & Items
Expected Result:
Export icon displays
Step Description:
Click on the Export icon
Expected Result:
The new blade is opened. General export and export to VirtoCommerce CSV is available.
Step Description:
Click on VirtoCommerce CSV.
Expected Result:
Blade Export catalog to CSV is opened with next fields:

Select fulfillment center for exported inventory. The dropdown shows all available fulfillment centers. 

Select price-list for exported prices. The dropdown shows all available price lists - empty value by default. 

  
Step Description:
Select value for fulfillment center from the list.
Expected Result:
Value is selected
Step Description:
Select available price-list from the list.
Expected Result:
Value is selected
Step Description:
Click on Start export
Expected Result:
Catalog to CSV export blade is opened
Export is started - all info display in blade:

Start
End
Total count
Processed count
Error count

Download Url

Step Description:
Click on URL
Expected Result:
The report is downloaded and opened. All products from the Catalog, include a product from the root display in the CSV file.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. Export icon displays
2. The new blade is opened. General export and export to VirtoCommerce CSV is available.
3. Blade Export catalog to CSV is opened with next fields:

Select fulfillment center for exported inventory. The dropdown shows all available fulfillment centers. 

Select price-list for exported prices. The dropdown shows all available price lists - empty value by default.
